note: FROZEN, HAND-CURATED, legally-defined JobTech reference nodes — see ADR 0043-amendment 2026-06-13 (Klass 2 options). Deliberately NOT generated by tools/taxonomy-snapshot/generate.mjs and NOT embedded in taxonomy-snapshot.json: employment-type/worktime-extent are flat, parentless, ~legally-stable sets (no growth like municipality), so the generator's freshness value is nil (CTO BESLUT 1 / ADR 0067 notat-precedens occupation-name-to-ssyk-level-4.v30.json). concept_id + Swedish preferred-label derived from the live dev corpus (job_ads.raw_payload->'employment_type'/'working_hours_type', distinct values 2026-06-13) = exactly the values that can appear in job_ads.employment_type_concept_id / worktime_extent_concept_id. Bump klass2Version to force re-seed. Honest source labels — Platsbanken-parity curation (omit/relabel/group) is an FE presentation concern (PR-2), not a data-layer concern (ACL stays honest, Evans 2003 ch. 14).
